commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: With one accord. With one mind, as in the Greek, and with one voice, being inspired by the Holy Spirit, they fell to prayer. (Witham)

commentaries.author: Interlinear Gloss
commentaries.content: That shout proceeded from delight and great emotion. Such indeed are the prayers which do their work, prayers replete with true philosophy, prayers offered up for such objects, by such persons, on such occasions, in such a manner; whereas all others are abominable and profane.

commentaries.author: Irenaeus of Lyons
commentaries.content: Against Thy holy Son Jesus, whom Thou hast anointed, both Herod and Pontius Pilate, with the Gentiles, and the people of Israel, were gathered together, to do whatsoever Thy hand and Thy counsel determined before to be done."

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
